name: Basic Apple Brunch Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the 4 cups of diced apples, 2 eggs (break over apples and stir), 1/2 cup vegetable oil, and 1 cup brown sugar.
2. Add in 1 cup white sugar or less, 2 teaspoons cinnamon, 2 cups all-purpose flour, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1 teaspoon baking soda.
3. Pour the mixture into a buttered glass baking dish.
4. Bake at 325-350 degrees for 45 minutes.
